name: Creamy Onions
recipeIngredient: 500 g frozen pearl onions or small white pickling onions -- peeled
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat butter in a 4-cup glass jug, covered with a paper towel, on HIGH for 45 seconds, or until melted.
2. Add chopped onion and cook on HIGH for 2-3 minutes until softened, stirring once.
3. Stir in flour until blended and cook on HIGH for 3-4 minutes until the sauce has thickened and is smooth, stirring twice.
4. Season with salt, pepper, and nutmeg.
5. Combine onions and sauce in a 23-cm round baking dish and cook on HIGH for 3-5 minutes until the sauce bubbles, stirring halfway through cooking.
6. Sprinkle paprika over the top if desired.
